creator: jose@we.lc.ehu.es
text:
This problem seems to be related to tputs() and the mytinfo library.
The "ldd" utility shows that the vim ELF executable depends on
/usr/lib/libmytinfo.so.2. This does not happens with the a.out
version on 2.2.7. If libmytinfo is moved or renamed, and then
vim is compiled again, the problem dissapears. Strange, isn't it?

-- JMA
